heroSubtext: A new way to delight and support your customers, users, and operators across automotive, healthcare, consumer electronics, and beyond.
overviewSubtext: GLUCOSE is built for industries where customer engagement is hard: high intermediation, product complexity, education requirements, and economics that break traditional CRM.

overviewPrimary.desc: Revolutionize the entire ownership journey from consideration to second purchase.

automotiveSubtext: From first consideration to second purchase, GLUCOSE engages customers at every touchpoint—discovery, configuration, ownership education, maintenance, feature discovery, and trade-in engagement.
automotiveImageAlt: GLUCOSE helping diagnose car warning light via WhatsApp

automotiveCards.title: Vehicle Configuration & Discovery
automotiveCards.body: Help customers explore models, compare trims, understand features, and configure their perfect vehicle through natural conversation.

automotiveCards.title: Ownership Onboarding
automotiveCards.body: Proactively introduce features, explain controls, and personalize the ownership experience from day one—reducing "how-to" support calls.

automotiveCards.title: Service & Maintenance
automotiveCards.body: Schedule service appointments, explain maintenance alerts, guide troubleshooting, and integrate with DMS systems for seamless experience.

automotiveCards.title: Feature Discovery
automotiveCards.body: Most owners never discover half the features they paid for. GLUCOSE contextually introduces features based on usage patterns and preferences.

automotiveStats.l: of vehicle features go unused by owners

primarySections.label: Healthcare
primarySections.heading: Personalized care that scales
primarySections.subtext: Patient engagement that respects complexity. Personalized guidance while maintaining compliance. Amplifying clinician reach, not replacing them.

cards.title: Medical Device Education
cards.body: Guide patients through device setup, usage instructions, and ongoing support for complex medical equipment—from glucose monitors to CPAP machines.

cards.title: Treatment Journey Support
cards.body: Proactive reminders, medication guidance, and personalized health information throughout the patient journey—with full compliance controls.

cards.title: Appointment Management
cards.body: Schedule, reschedule, and provide pre-appointment instructions through natural conversation across messaging platforms.

cards.title: Compliance & Guardrails
cards.body: Built-in IGDs (Instructions & Guidelines Documents) ensure GLUCOSE operates within strict healthcare compliance requirements.

primarySections.label: Consumer Appliances
primarySections.heading: Turn unboxing into brand loyalty
primarySections.subtext: Most customers never discover half the features they paid for. GLUCOSE helps them explore, learn, and get more value—building brand love instead of support tickets.

cards.title: Product Onboarding
cards.body: Guide users through setup, initial configuration, and first-use experiences for smart home devices, appliances, and electronics.

cards.title: Feature Education
cards.body: Contextually introduce advanced features based on user behavior and preferences—turning casual users into power users.

cards.title: Troubleshooting & Support
cards.body: Instant, 24/7 troubleshooting through natural conversation—reducing support ticket volume while improving customer satisfaction.

cards.title: Accessory & Upgrade Recommendations
cards.body: Contextual recommendations for compatible accessories, software updates, and product upgrades based on usage patterns.

primarySections.label: Financial Services
primarySections.heading: Build trust at scale
primarySections.subtext: Contextual guidance for complex, personal financial products—account questions, product education, life-stage recommendations—with control and compliance built in.

cards.title: Product Recommendations
cards.body: Provide personalized guidance to help customers choose the best financial products for their needs—increasing acquisition and cross-sell rates.

cards.title: Account Support
cards.body: Respond immediately to questions about account balances, fees, transactions, and policies—boosting customer trust and satisfaction.

cards.title: Life-Stage Engagement
cards.body: Proactively engage customers during major life events—home buying, retirement planning, education funding—with contextual product information.

cards.title: Security & Compliance
cards.body: Enterprise-grade security with encrypted data, compliance guardrails, and audit logging for regulated financial services.

primarySections.label: Retail & Consumer Goods
primarySections.heading: Seamless customer experiences
primarySections.subtext: Boost brand loyalty, conversion, and lifetime value with personalized product guidance and post-purchase support.

cards.title: Product Discovery
cards.body: Help shoppers find the perfect product through conversational commerce—understanding needs and recommending solutions.

cards.title: Order Support
cards.body: Track orders, handle returns, process exchanges, and resolve issues instantly through natural conversation.

cards.title: Product Usage Guidance
cards.body: Provide ongoing support for complex products—assembly instructions, care guides, usage tips, and troubleshooting.

cards.title: Loyalty & Re-engagement
cards.body: Personalized recommendations, reorder reminders, and loyalty program engagement to drive repeat purchases.

primarySections.label: Industrial Equipment & Machinery
primarySections.heading: Maximize asset utilization
primarySections.subtext: GLUCOSE provides tailored, real-time insights and assistance for complex industrial equipment—enhancing operational efficiency for fleet managers and operators alike.

cards.title: Operator Training
cards.body: On-demand guidance for equipment operation, safety procedures, and best practices—reducing training time and errors.

cards.title: Maintenance Support
cards.body: Proactive maintenance reminders, troubleshooting assistance, and service scheduling integrated with your systems.

cards.title: IoT Integration
cards.body: Connect GLUCOSE to IoT sensors for context-aware support—responding to equipment alerts with relevant guidance.

cards.title: Documentation Access
cards.body: Instant access to manuals, specifications, and procedures through natural conversation—no more searching through binders.

expansionSections.label: Commercial & Industrial Vehicles
expansionSections.heading: Keep fleets running with autonomous AI support
expansionSections.subtext: From trucks and buses to construction equipment, GLUCOSE enables OEMs and fleet operators to provide instant diagnostics, maintenance scheduling, and driver support — reducing downtime and operational costs.

cards.title: Predictive Maintenance
cards.body: AI agents that alert operators before breakdowns, schedule service, and coordinate parts availability.

cards.title: Driver & Operator Support
cards.body: 24/7 multimodal assistance for vehicle operation, troubleshooting, and compliance documentation.

cards.title: Fleet Analytics
cards.body: Capture first-party data on usage patterns, common issues, and operator needs across your entire fleet.

expansionSections.label: Buildings & Property Units
expansionSections.heading: Intelligent engagement for property occupants and buyers
expansionSections.subtext: From smart buildings to residential developments, GLUCOSE helps property managers and developers engage with tenants, buyers, and visitors through autonomous AI that handles inquiries, schedules viewings, and manages facility requests.

cards.title: Tenant Support
cards.body: Autonomous handling of maintenance requests, facility bookings, and community communications.

cards.title: Property Sales
cards.body: Qualify leads, schedule viewings, and guide prospective buyers through property features via WhatsApp and chat.

cards.title: Smart Building Integration
cards.body: Connect to IoT systems for real-time facility management, energy monitoring, and occupant notifications.

expansionSections.label: Energy & Utilities
expansionSections.heading: Modernize customer engagement for energy providers
expansionSections.subtext: GLUCOSE helps energy and utility companies automate customer support, manage service requests, and deliver proactive usage insights — improving satisfaction while reducing operational burden.

cards.title: Usage & Billing Support
cards.body: Autonomous agents that explain bills, compare plans, and process account changes instantly.

cards.title: Proactive Notifications
cards.body: Alert customers about outages, maintenance windows, and consumption anomalies before they contact you.

cards.title: Demand Response
cards.body: Engage customers in energy-saving programs through intelligent, personalized communication campaigns.

expansionSections.label: Hospitality & Travel
expansionSections.heading: Elevate the guest experience from booking to checkout
expansionSections.subtext: GLUCOSE enables hotels, resorts, and travel operators to deliver concierge-level service at scale — handling reservations, answering questions, and personalizing recommendations via the channels guests already use.

cards.title: AI Concierge
cards.body: Autonomous guest support for bookings, room service, local recommendations, and special requests.

cards.title: Multilingual Engagement
cards.body: Serve international guests in 50+ languages across WhatsApp, LINE, and other regional channels.

cards.title: Loyalty & Upsell
cards.body: Proactively engage guests with personalized upgrade offers, loyalty rewards, and post-stay follow-ups.

expansionSections.label: Consumer Goods
expansionSections.heading: Own the direct-to-consumer relationship
expansionSections.subtext: GLUCOSE helps CPG and consumer goods brands engage directly with end consumers, bypassing retail intermediaries to build brand loyalty, gather product feedback, and drive repeat purchases.

cards.title: Product Education
cards.body: Guide consumers through product features, usage tips, and care instructions via conversational AI.

cards.title: Consumer Insights
cards.body: Capture first-party data on preferences, feedback, and purchase intent directly from conversations.

cards.title: Lifecycle Engagement
cards.body: Proactive re-engagement for refills, upgrades, and loyalty programs — building long-term brand relationships.

crossBenefitsSubtext: Regardless of your industry, GLUCOSE delivers consistent value through its enterprise-grade agentic AI platform.

crossBenefits.title: Omnichannel
crossBenefits.desc: WhatsApp, Telegram, Line, Viber, and more

ctaHeading: Discover what GLUCOSE can do for your industry
ctaBody: See how GLUCOSE can help your enterprise deliver autonomous brand and product experiences that reach every customer, in every moment that matters.
